'''Lee Phenets''' was an [[Engineer/Legends|engineer]] living and working on [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin's]] [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]] when the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] occupied the city in the clouds. Phenets was a maintenance specialist who had to ensure of the smooth operation of Cloud City. He was respected by the [[Ugnaught/Legends|Ugnaught]] population and wore the same overalls as many Ugnaughts.

==Biography==
In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], he was living on [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin's]] [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]] where he worked as an [[Engineer/Legends|engineer]]. He was seen walking with some Ugnaughts including [[Grugnak]], through the corridors of Cloud City after Lando Calrissian was escorting [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], and Princess [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] for refreshment, not to know that he was leading them into a trap which was planned by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]].
